1_file_map: tools/qa_smoke.py — runs determinism_guard, pytest, and observe_sync headless profiles for merge gate
tools/determinism_guard.py — static scan for wall-clock and unseeded RNG in simulation code paths
tools/observe_sync.py — headless sim runner and --qa assertion collection
tools/validate_assets.py — manifest existence, attribution, and path validation for assets/
tools/assets_manifest.json — building prefab and model declarations consumed by validate_assets
tests/ — pytest invoked inside qa_smoke for regression coverage
QA_TEST_PLAN.md / RELEASE_QA_CHECKLIST.md — living human test docs (not part of automated exit codes)
2_architecture_options: OPT A — Run full qa_smoke --quick + validate_assets --report after each major merge (03, 12, 15) and once at sprint close: PROS early regression signal, matches PM prompt; CONS multiple runs; RISK low; EFFORT low — SELECTED
OPT B — Gate only at sprint end: PROS fewer runs; CONS late bisect; RISK medium; EFFORT low — rejected
OPT C — Add WK32-specific observe_sync scenario for construction/camera: PROS targeted; CONS scope creep for consult sprint; RISK medium; EFFORT medium — deferred unless PM requests new assertions
pre_code_checklist_qa_subsystem.3_existing_code_conflicts: None identified for QA tooling. WK32 Ursina/renderer WIP could theoretically diverge headless vs game-only paths; if qa_smoke FAILs after a merge, triage per PM: 03 (renderer/camera/water/construction resolver), 12 (pack color / manifest / validate_assets), 15 (prefabs/environment meshes). pm_role_note: PM emergency edits to ursina_renderer.py / ursina_app.py are Agent 03 ownership for commit/refactor; gates run on current working tree including uncommitted WIP.
